alpha.url: The property consists of a primary structure situated within a developed site containing landscaped areas, vegetation, and open space. Access is provided by a driveway connected to a roadway, leading to vehicle parking and circulation areas adjacent to the structure. Multiple outdoor features, pathways, and maintained grounds are visible throughout the property.

A driveway provides access to vehicle parking and circulation areas adjacent to the structure. Additional outdoor features, pathways, and open space are visible throughout the developed portion of the site.

delta.url: The view shows the primary structure located within a developed property containing landscaped sections and mature vegetation.
